title: move on!
description: rebalances movement options to create a more well-rounded experience! [currently only does so by adding a new type of rail and making rails faster]
body:
> **please leave any feedback, including bug reports and suggestions, on the [issues page](https://github.com/gamemode-3/move-on-1.21.5/issues)!**
# DESCRIPTION
Rebalances movement options to create a more well-rounded experience! There's much more planned, but right now it only improves rails to be faster and cheaper.
# FEATURES
## improved powered rails
#### copper powered rails
powered rails just got cheaper! combine a rail, redstone and a copper ingot to get a powered rail. it's also a tad faster than before.
regular rails have a slightly modified recipe, now requiring three sticks per craft.
#### booster rails
with the same recipe but a gold ingot, you can craft booster rails. they'll be even faster
than the new powered rails. you can also build a mixed track of some powered and some booster rails to get speeds in between.
#### derailing
though they take a while to accelerate, going at full speed with with booster rails is really, _really_ fast. if you're going faster than a powered (copper) rail, you'll derail in any curve. luckily, activator rails will slow you just enough to not derail. one's enough if you're just going a bit quick, but you'll need two if you're really pushin' the pedal to the metal! 

derailing can be configured to your liking or turned off :)

## configs
you can configure everything in `.minecraft/config/move-on-config.properties`.
> [how to find `.minecraft`?](https://minecraft.wiki/w/.minecraft)

## credits
credits to [simple config](https://github.com/magistermaks/fabric-simplelibs/tree/master/simple-config) and [kaupenjoe](https://github.com/Tutorials-By-Kaupenjoe/Fabric-Tutorial-1.17.1/tree/28-simpleConfigs) for the config framework!

i have the rail idea from JetStarfish's video on YouTube, who in turn had it from a YouTube comment by [Sporkaganza](https://www.youtube.com/@einootspork) on [this video]([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O2qCIvXALiw&list=PLGwH3ofslfrTDK0SEVLHzTrRJgqtcTigv&index=2](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O2qCIvXALiw&list=PLGwH3ofslfrTDK0SEVLHzTrRJgqtcTigv&index=2)).
specifically Sporkaganza had the idea for the concept of copper and gold rails where gold is faster. 
most of the details differ from their conceptions.
all textures are my own edits of Minecraft vanilla textures.
